summary: Completed testing of User Engagement & Retention features. All 13 backend tests pass. Frontend UI tests confirm Google Auth buttons, SVG flag icons in language selector (11 languages), notification toggle, and username edit button are working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/feedback accepts feedback with user info
GET /api/stats/activity returns activity data (total_today, nearby_today, active_zones, user_rank)
GET /api/stats/activity with lat/lng returns nearby data
PUT /api/users/username allows username change for all users
PUT /api/users/username validates username format (min 3 chars, alphanumeric only)
UI: Login page has Google login button with SVG icon
UI: Register page has Google register button with SVG icon
UI: Language selector shows 11 languages with SVG flag icons
UI: Profile page has notification toggle (data-testid='notification-toggle')
UI: Profile page has edit username button for all users
UI: Google callback page route exists at /auth/google/callback
critical_code_review_comments: ActivityBanner.js hooks order is now correct - useState at line 9-10, useEffect at lines 12 and 44
Minor: Several pages have eslint warnings about missing dependencies in useEffect (not errors, just warnings)
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Engagement & Retention features fully tested. Google Auth endpoint works (returns 400/401 for invalid sessions as expected - actual Google OAuth flow requires real Google session). Language selector has 11 languages with SVG flags (es, en, de, nl, pl, ar, uk, ru, eu, ca, val). Profile page notification toggle and username edit button work for all users. ActivityBanner component hooks order is fixed (no more React hooks violation). Activity stats endpoint returns data correctly.

verified_features.google_auth_endpoint: PASS - Returns 400 for missing session_id, 401 for invalid session
verified_features.google_auth_login_button: PASS - SVG Google icon on login page
verified_features.google_auth_register_button: PASS - SVG Google icon on register page
verified_features.language_selector_svg_flags: PASS - All 11 languages have SVG flag icons
verified_features.feedback_endpoint: PASS - Accepts anonymous and authenticated feedback
verified_features.activity_stats_endpoint: PASS - Returns total_today, nearby_today, active_zones, user_rank
verified_features.activity_banner_component: PASS - No React hooks errors, component renders when data available
verified_features.profile_username_edit: PASS - Edit button available for all users (not just Premium)
verified_features.username_validation: PASS - Validates min 3 chars, alphanumeric + underscore only
